name: Landing Zone

equipment: 3 target circles (10-foot radius) at 30, 50, and 70 yards
setup.description: Set up three 10-foot landing circles at 30, 50, and 70 yards. Hit 3 balls to each distance.

rules.description: Play 3 balls per distance, starting at 30 yards and working out to 70. A ball counts if it lands inside the circle.
scoring: 1 point per ball landing inside its circle

caption: Three distances, one job each time: land it in the circle. #golfable #golftok #golfpractice #loweryourhandicap
